implementation.approach: owner-approved request-access path into membership plus owner-signed per-member resource budgets for inference consumption

access_requests.submission: POST /v1/access-requests (public, unauthenticated) accepts SignedAccessRequest with Ed25519 self-signature proving key possession
access_requests.pending_storage: PersistedState.pending_access_requests (unsigned, local, no generation bump) alongside redeemed_token_ids
access_requests.approval: POST /v1/access-requests/approve (admin-tier) — bumps generation, pushes Member, signs; never implicitly creates ResourceBudget or forwarding entries
access_requests.denial: POST /v1/access-requests/deny (admin-tier) — drops pending entry, no signed-state mutation

resource_budgets.validate_state: BudgetNodeUnknown, DuplicateBudgetNode, EmptyResourceBudget — deliberately not cross-checked against forwarding_policy or model_assignments
resource_budgets.store_pattern: set_resource_budget follows set_forwarding_policy pattern (clone-bump-sign, idempotent guard); remove_resource_budget mirrors

enforcement.mechanism: per-member Arc<Semaphore> for max_in_flight + Vec<u64> sliding window for max_requests_per_window
enforcement.reconciliation: reconciles with NetworkState on every signed state update
enforcement.gate_1_libp2p: serve_inference (peer_service.rs) calls budget_enforcer.try_admit() after AuthView authorization, before global admission semaphore. No budget → fail closed.
enforcement.gate_2_http: per-credential InferenceIdentity quota and global admission semaphore continue to govern HTTP inference clients; BudgetEnforcer is additional, independent gate for DLLM network members
enforcement.isolation: per-member: Node A's quota exhaustion does not affect Node B

new_methods: set_resource_budget(node_pubkey, max_in_flight, max_requests_per_window, window_seconds) -> Result<bool, StoreError>
store_mutations.revoke_member_extension: retain on resource_budgets alongside existing forwarding_policy/model_assignments/placements/hardware_profiles/transport_bindings cleanup

inference_policy.new: returns InferencePolicyResponse { credentials: Vec<InferencePolicy>, member_budgets: Vec<ResourceBudget> }

files_changed.crates/dllm-protocol/src/lib.rs: AccessRequest, SignedAccessRequest, ResourceBudget structs; SignedAccessRequest::sign/verify; resource_budgets on NetworkState; BudgetNodeUnknown/DuplicateBudgetNode/EmptyResourceBudget StateError variants; validate_state budget checks; 5 new tests
files_changed.crates/dllm-daemon/src/lib.rs: 6 new StoreError variants; pending_access_requests on PersistedState and NetworkStore; 6 new mutation methods; revoke_member resource_budgets cleanup; save/load/create updates; 10 new tests
files_changed.crates/dllm-daemon/src/budget.rs: NEW FILE — BudgetEnforcer, MemberBudgetState, BudgetPermit, BudgetError; try_admit with semaphore + sliding window; reconcile; 5 new tests
files_changed.crates/dllm-daemon/src/api.rs: budget_enforcer on ApiState; 5 new API routes; 6 new handler functions; InferencePolicyResponse wrapper; AccessRequestRequest/ApproveAccessRequest/DenyAccessRequest/SetBudgetRequest/RemoveBudgetRequest types
files_changed.crates/dllm-daemon/src/peer_service.rs: node_pubkey passed into serve_inference; BudgetEnforcer gate after AuthView authorization, before global admission semaphore
files_changed.crates/dllm-daemon/src/main.rs: BudgetEnforcer construction on both primary and additional ApiState
files_changed.crates/dllm-cli/src/main.rs: 6 new CLI subcommands; SignedAccessRequest self-signing for request-access

new_tests.name: signed_access_request_verifies_and_detects_tampering
new_tests.assertions: Self-signed access request verifies; tampered request fails verification

new_tests.name: signed_access_request_wrong_key_rejected
new_tests.assertions: Signature made with key A but node_pubkey claims key B fails verification

new_tests.name: resource_budget_validate_state_rejects_unknown_node
new_tests.assertions: Budget for node not in members or owner → BudgetNodeUnknown

new_tests.name: resource_budget_validate_state_rejects_duplicate
new_tests.assertions: Two budget entries for same node → DuplicateBudgetNode

new_tests.name: resource_budget_validate_state_rejects_empty
new_tests.assertions: max_in_flight=0 && max_requests_per_window=0 → EmptyResourceBudget

new_tests.name: submit_access_request_stores_pending
new_tests.assertions: Valid signed request appears in list_access_requests

new_tests.name: submit_access_request_rejects_duplicate
new_tests.assertions: Second submission from same node_pubkey → AccessRequestAlreadyPending

new_tests.name: submit_access_request_rejects_existing_member
new_tests.assertions: Request from current member → AccessRequestAlreadyMember

new_tests.name: approve_then_deny_access_request
new_tests.assertions: Approve removes pending, adds Member, bumps generation

new_tests.name: deny_access_request_removes_pending
new_tests.assertions: Deny drops pending entry; generation unchanged; node not a member

new_tests.name: set_and_remove_resource_budget
new_tests.assertions: Budget upsert/remove with idempotency; granted_generation preserved on no-op

new_tests.name: resource_budget_rejects_unknown_node
new_tests.assertions: Budget for unknown node → BudgetNodeUnknown

new_tests.name: resource_budget_rejects_empty
new_tests.assertions: Zero/zero budget → EmptyResourceBudget

new_tests.name: revoke_member_strips_resource_budget
new_tests.assertions: Full revocation removes budget alongside member/forwarding/assignments

new_tests.name: resource_budget_independent_of_forwarding_policy
new_tests.assertions: Budget can exist without forwarding; forwarding can exist without budget; removing one leaves the other

new_tests.name: no_budget_entry_returns_no_budget
new_tests.assertions: try_admit for node with no budget → BudgetError::NoBudget

new_tests.name: budget_permits_up_to_max_in_flight
new_tests.assertions: Admissions succeed up to max_in_flight; next fails with Saturated; drop releases permit

new_tests.name: sliding_window_enforces_max_requests_per_window
new_tests.assertions: Admissions within window up to limit succeed; next fails with WindowExhausted

new_tests.name: isolated_member_budgets
new_tests.assertions: Node A and Node B each hold their own permits; A's exhaustion does not affect B

new_tests.name: reconcile_removes_stale_budgets
new_tests.assertions: After reconcile with empty state, previously valid budget returns NoBudget

independence_invariants.consumer_without_compute: member can hold ResourceBudget with zero forwarding/assignment entries (unit test: resource_budget_independent_of_forwarding_policy)
independence_invariants.contributor_without_consumption: member can hold forwarding eligibility and model assignments with no ResourceBudget (unit test: resource_budget_independent_of_forwarding_policy)
independence_invariants.partial_removal: removing ResourceBudget leaves ForwardingPolicy/ModelAssignment untouched, and vice versa
independence_invariants.full_revocation: only revoke_member clears all: members, forwarding_policy, model_assignments, resource_budgets, transport_bindings
independence_invariants.approval_no_implicit_grants: approve_access_request never implicitly creates ResourceBudget or forwarding entry

physical_validation: deferred to later milestone or on-demand VPS testing
